"CWE-338", "name": "Use of Cryptographically Weak Pseudo-Random Number Generator (PRNG)"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-1023", "name": "Incomplete Comparison with Missing Factors"}], "description": "Versions of the package jsrsasign from 7.0.0 and before 11.1.1 are vulnerable to Incomplete Comparison with Missing Factors via the getRandomBigIntegerZeroToMax and getRandomBigIntegerMinToMax functions in src/crypto-1.1.js; an attacker can recover the private key by exploiting the incorrect compareTo checks that accept out-of-range candidates and thus bias DSA nonces during signature generation.",
